_comment: Per-camera counting lines as x1,y1,x2,y2 frame fractions, matched to each view's road geometry (picked from gridded reference frames). Keys are clip-stem prefixes; track_analytics.py auto-resolves by longest matching prefix. chalong: diagonal road toward a vanishing point upper-left -> constant-depth cross-section. kathu: wide junction, flow fans from the top mouth -> tilted gate below it. sakhu: main road runs HORIZONTALLY across frame -> vertical gate (the old horizontal default was parallel to traffic and missed nearly everything).
